decision: Exit nonzero and avoid a repeated request. rerun_avoided references the byte-preserved prior detail; output_closed preserves proved detail and creates a separate sidecar linked by path and digest.
evidenceRequired: Focused loopback fixture proving zero requests on identity reuse and byte-identical retained detail.
Closed-stdout fixture proving a distinct content-addressed sidecar with priorDetail linkage.
limitations: Loopback HTTP fixtures do not prove any Vercel Preview or model-provider response.
nonClaims: A handled rerun or pipe close is not a healthy or proved Preview.
rollbackRevocation: Revert the receipt producer, tests, and runbook wording together; provider revocation is outside this local fixture.
